indications.text:
1.1 Septicemia
Vancomycin Injection is indicated in adults and pediatric patients (1 month and older) for the
treatment of septicemia due to:
• Susceptible isolates of methicillin-resistant Staphylococcus aureus (MRSA) and coagulase
negative staphylococci.
• Methicillin-susceptible staphylococci in ...
